mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_incident_response WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY reported_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_incident_response WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_incident_response WHERE response_id = #{responseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_incident_response WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_incident_response WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_incident_response WHERE deleted = 0 AND is_drill = #{isDrill}
SELECT MAX(response_id) FROM tb_incident_response WHERE response_id LIKE #{yearPrefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_incident_response ( response_id, title, incident_type, status, severity, location, reported_at, is_drill, reporter, description, action_taken, casualty_info, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{responseId}, #{title}, #{incidentType}, #{status}'ISSUED', #{severity}'MODERATE', #{location}, #{reportedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDrill}0, #{reporter,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{actionTaken,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{casualtyInfo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_incident_response SET title = #{title}, incident_type = #{incidentType}, status = #{status}, severity = #{severity,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, location = #{location}, reported_at = #{reportedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_drill = #{isDrill}0, reporter = #{reporter,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, action_taken = #{actionTaken,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, casualty_info = #{casualtyInfo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_incident_response SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
